author: NewyorkDev, Claude, and Codex
name: BIJEPAX-lite JEPA + SP8192 CaseOps PPM
blurb: A Claude-designed, JEPA-inspired training-only hidden-state regularizer layered onto the SP8192 CaseOps + per-group compression + PPM sliding evaluator. Predictor heads are separate from the base model, optimized only during training, and absent from the serialized artifact. Three full seeds complete under the 600s train/eval budgets and strict 16,000,000 byte artifact cap. Final 3-seed mean ppm_sliding val_bpb is 0.97271454.
